final:
// // This register captures and holds 8 bits of data. Upon receiving a positive clock edge, the register resets to one if the reset signal is inactive. If the reset is active and the write enable signal (wenb) is high, the register updates its value with the incoming data (in_data). If wenb is low, the register retains its current value.
module top_module(output reg [7:0] reg_0x1F, input wire reset, input wire wenb, input wire [7:0] in_data, input wire clk);always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset == 1'b1) begin
            reg_0x1F <= 8'h00;
        end
        else begin
            if (wenb == 1'b0) begin
                reg_0x1F <= in_data;
            end
            else begin
                reg_0x1F <= reg_0x1F;
            end
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This register captures and holds 8 bits of data. Upon receiving a positive clock edge, the register resets to one if the reset signal is inactive. If the reset is active and the write enable signal (wenb) is high, the register updates its value with the incoming data (in_data). If wenb is low, the register retains its current value.
